CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c), "Aircraft MR", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Bnk_For_MR__r.Name, "Security Deposit", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Bnk_For_SD__r.Name, "Other", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Bank_Account_For_Others__r.Name, "Fixed Rent", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__r.Name, "Floating Rent", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__r.Name, "Manual Rent", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__r.Name, "Power By The Hour", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__r.Name, "MR", leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Bnk_For_MR__r.Name, "" )
CustomField.label: Contract Bank Account Name
